title: Psammophila arundinacea
taxonomy: Psammophila arundinacea is classified as a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It is also known as sand grass or dune grass, which is a common name for several species of grasses. The plant is native to parts of Africa and Asia. The classification of Psammophila arundinacea at the family level is further divided into the subfamily Chloridoideae. At the genus level, it is placed in the genus Psammophila.
